text.title: AI Accessibility Automation 2026 Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example showing how the methodology produces a spec artefact from the input through every rule + procedure step.

section.title: Scenario
section.p: End-to-end example traced in `content/05-examples.xml`: weekly deploy → 47 violations → AI ranks → lead approves top-12 → VPAT updated → signed.
